message:
chore: audit batch 393 (4 files, ~8,659L, 0 bugs)

Fresh-eyes audit of core integration test files:
- runtime_e2e.rs (2003L): 23 tests, task lifecycle + cancellation + obligations
- property_region_ops.rs (2372L): property-based region ops with custom shrinker
- leak_regression_e2e.rs (1921L): 3 leak-detection subsystems + ResourceAccounting
- ci_regression_gates.rs (2363L): RaptorQ CI gates, 8 levers, structured logging
All SOUND, 0 bugs found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
